---
title: "Finanzas Públicas y Mercado Laboral"
subtitle: "Deuda del Sector Público y Desempleo en Chile"
date: last-modified
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go

url_fp = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Economia-y-politicas-publicas/chiledatos/main/data/finanzas_publicas.csv"
url_trabajo = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Economia-y-politicas-publicas/chiledatos/main/data/trabajo.csv"

df = pd.read_csv(url_fp, sep=",", encoding="utf-8")
df.columns = [
    "periodo", "deuda_bruta_gc", "deuda_neta_gc",
    "deuda_bruta_bc", "deuda_neta_bc",
    "deuda_bruta_sp", "deuda_neta_sp",
    "deuda_bruta_ep", "deuda_neta_ep",
]
cols_numericas = [
    "deuda_bruta_gc", "deuda_neta_gc",
    "deuda_bruta_bc", "deuda_neta_bc",
    "deuda_bruta_sp", "deuda_neta_sp",
    "deuda_bruta_ep", "deuda_neta_ep",
]
df[cols_numericas] = df[cols_numericas].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors="coerce")
df["fecha"] = pd.to_datetime(df["periodo"], format="%b.%Y", errors="coerce")
df = df.dropna(subset=["fecha"]).sort_values("fecha")

dt = pd.read_csv(url_trabajo, sep="\t", encoding="utf-8")
dt.columns = ["periodo", "total", "hombre", "mujer"]
dt[["total","hombre","mujer"]] = dt[["total","hombre","mujer"]].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors="coerce")
dt["fecha"] = pd.to_datetime(dt["periodo"].str.extract(r"(\w+ \d{4})$")[0], format="%b %Y", errors="coerce")
dt = dt.dropna(subset=["fecha"]).sort_values("fecha")

AUTOR = "Autor: Juan Miguieles Onetto | Fuente: Banco Central de Chile / INE"

def agregar_autor(fig):
    fig.update_layout(
        annotations=[dict(
            text=AUTOR,
            x=0, y=-0.15,
            xref="paper", yref="paper",
            showarrow=False,
            font=dict(size=10, color="gray"),
            xanchor="left",
        )]
    )
    return fig
```

## 1. Gobierno Central

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_bruta_gc"],
    name="Deuda bruta", line=dict(color="#e74c3c"),
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_neta_gc"],
    name="Deuda neta", line=dict(color="#2980b9"),
))
fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="gray", opacity=0.5)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Gobierno Central: deuda bruta y neta (% del PIB)",
    yaxis_title="% del PIB", xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white", font_family="Inter",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2, x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```

## 2. Banco Central

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_bruta_bc"],
    name="Deuda bruta", line=dict(color="#e74c3c"),
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_neta_bc"],
    name="Deuda neta", line=dict(color="#2980b9"),
))
fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="gray", opacity=0.5)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Banco Central: deuda bruta y neta (% del PIB)",
    yaxis_title="% del PIB", xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white", font_family="Inter",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2, x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```

## 3. Sector Público Consolidado

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_bruta_sp"],
    name="Deuda bruta", line=dict(color="#e74c3c"),
    fill="tozeroy", fillcolor="rgba(231,76,60,0.1)",
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_neta_sp"],
    name="Deuda neta", line=dict(color="#2980b9"),
))
fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="gray", opacity=0.5)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Sector Público Consolidado: deuda bruta y neta (% del PIB)",
    yaxis_title="% del PIB", xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white", font_family="Inter",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2, x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```

## 4. Empresas Públicas

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_bruta_ep"],
    name="Deuda bruta", line=dict(color="#e74c3c"),
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_neta_ep"],
    name="Deuda neta", line=dict(color="#2980b9"),
))
fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="gray", opacity=0.5)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Empresas Públicas: deuda bruta y neta (% del PIB)",
    yaxis_title="% del PIB", xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white", font_family="Inter",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2, x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```

---

## 5. Desempleo por sexo

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=dt["fecha"], y=dt["total"],
    name="Total", line=dict(color="#f39c12", width=2),
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=dt["fecha"], y=dt["hombre"],
    name="Hombre", line=dict(color="#2980b9", width=2),
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=dt["fecha"], y=dt["mujer"],
    name="Mujer", line=dict(color="#e74c3c", width=2),
))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Tasa de desempleo por sexo (%)",
    yaxis_title="Tasa de desempleo (%)",
    xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white",
    font_family="Inter",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2, x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```

## 6. Brecha de desempleo hombre/mujer

```{python}
dt["brecha"] = dt["mujer"] - dt["hombre"]

fig = px.bar(
    dt, x="fecha", y="brecha",
    color="brecha",
    color_continuous_scale="RdYlGn_r",
    labels={"brecha": "Brecha (pp)", "fecha": "Período"},
    template="plotly_white",
)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Brecha de desempleo mujer − hombre (puntos porcentuales)",
    font_family="Inter",
    coloraxis_showscale=False,
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```
